routes.title: Spa at the End of Time — Kris Krug | AI Keynote Speaker & Creative Technologist
routes.og:description: Kate Armstrong turned the planetarium into a séance. Flux LoRA trained on her hot tub paintings. Not AI wallpaper... an oracle of leisure, plumbing, and the post-body future.
routes.twitter:description: Kate Armstrong turned the planetarium into a séance. Flux LoRA trained on her hot tub paintings. Not AI wallpaper... an oracle of leisure, plumbing, and the post-body future.
routes.og:title: Spa at the End of Time
h1_texts: Spa at the End of Time
The images: comfort tech turns into cosmic interface
The voice: a medium, not a narrator
The AI part: a haunted paintbrush
The dome does something to your body
The room: artists, weirdos, and people who actually make things
Why it landed: it’s a spa, it’s a warning, it’s a love letter

routes.title: AI’s Next Chapter: Notes from BC’s AI Ecosystem — Kris Krug | AI Keynote Speaker & Creative Technologist
routes.og:description: This is our moment to decide what we want this technology to be. Do we let it become another tool of digital feudalism, or do we grab the reins and steer it toward something more equitable, more creative, more human? That's the revolution I'm here for.
routes.twitter:description: This is our moment to decide what we want this technology to be. Do we let it become another tool of digital feudalism, or do we grab the reins and steer it toward something more equitable, more creative, more human? That's the revolution I'm here for.
